summary: Verified removal of 'تصفح المنتجات' button from GiftsPage.js empty states. Code review confirms the button has been removed and replaced with explanatory text. UI testing was limited due to login flow issues in Playwright automation.

integration_issues.issue: Login button click doesn't trigger navigation in automated tests, though backend API login works correctly (200 OK). This is a test environment issue, not a production bug.

critical_code_review_comments: GiftsPage.js lines 560-569: Sent gifts empty state correctly shows 'لم ترسل أي هدايا بعد' message with explanatory text - NO 'تصفح المنتجات' button present ✅
GiftsPage.js lines 380-389: Received gifts empty state correctly shows 'لا توجد هدايا مستلمة' message - NO button present ✅
Both empty states use pink-purple gradient (from-pink-100 to-purple-100) with pink-400 icon color ✅
data-testid attributes present: 'received-gifts-tab', 'sent-gifts-tab' for tab navigation
context_for_next_testing_agent: GiftsPage.js button removal verified via code review. Login flow in Playwright has issues - button click doesn't trigger form submission. Backend login API works correctly (verified in logs). For future UI testing, may need to investigate React form handling in Playwright.
